title: Performance regression
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE user_comments (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, comment TEXT NOT NULL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO user_comments (comment) VALUES ('This is a test comment.');
SELECT * FROM user_comments WHERE comment IS NULL;
UPDATE user_comments SET comment = 'Updated comment' WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM user_comments WHERE comment = 'This is a test comment.');
